PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  wd:Q20512 wdt:P508 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P1524 ?stage .
  ?stage rdfs:label "Round of 16" @en .
  ?match wdt:P1995 ?stage .
  ?match wdt:P585 ?date .
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1
